data.content:
All 8 tests pass. Here's the test file I created at `tests/ServiceRegistryTests.cs`:

| Test | Assertion used |
|------|---------------|
| Register + Resolve same instance | `Assert.AreSame` |
| Resolve unregistered → null | `Assert.IsNull` |
| ResolveRequired unregistered → throws | `Assert.ThrowsExactly<InvalidOperationException>` |
| Register null → throws | `Assert.ThrowsExactly<ArgumentNullException>` |
| Clear removes all | `Assert.IsNull` + `Assert.AreEqual(0, …)` |
| Remove specific service | `Assert.IsNull` / `Assert.IsNotNull` |
| GetAll returns all | `Assert.AreEqual` + `Assert.IsTrue` |
| Re-register overwrites | `Assert.AreSame` |

I also enabled `ImplicitUsings` and `Nullable` in both `.csproj` files since the source uses `T?` and BCL types without explicit `using` directives.
